creator: sperber@FreeBSD.org
text:
I found the problem.
My home directories are on a nfs mount - which worked fine for previouse versions - as it seems jetbrains changed some file access methods - which causes intellij (and clion) fail to start on newer (> 2018.x) versions.

This is clearly not a port problem - I'll therefore close the pr.

Thank's for the input!
